title: Marketing Executive (Social Media)
description:
We’re looking for a creative go-getter who lives and breathes social media trends — someone who can spot a viral moment before it happens. As a Marketing Executive, you’ll be the brain behind our Telegram and TikTok strategies, crafting content that keeps our audiences talking, sharing, and coming back for more.


If you’re the type who scrolls through TikTok for “research” 👀 and knows exactly what gets people to click that share button — we want you.


🎯 What You’ll Do

• Spot trends like a hawk — research what’s hot on Telegram, TikTok, and beyond, then turn insights into fun, shareable content strategies
• Plan and create engaging content across all platforms — think static posts, short-form videos, memes, polls, and cheeky Telegram blasts that people actually want to read
• Bring campaigns to life — brainstorm, produce, and schedule content that aligns with our clients’ goals while keeping things fresh and exciting
• Track and optimise — monitor campaign performance, analyse what’s working, and tweak strategies for maximum engagement and growth
• Experiment and innovate — test new digital trends, tools, and formats that push creative boundaries (AI-generated memes? TikTok series? Let’s go.)
• Keep our digital presence sharp — continuously review and update content across all channels to make sure everything’s on-brand and on-point
• Collaborate with brands and the team to ideate, execute, and grow impactful content marketing campaigns that drive real buzz online


⚡ You’re the One If You:

• Have a strong knack for writing and creating content that hooks people from the first line
• Know your way around Telegram channels, TikTok sounds, and Instagram Reels
• Thrive in a fast-paced, meme-filled, deadline-driven environment
• Are self-motivated, organised, and a great team player
• Understand the Singapore marketing landscape and what gets local audiences talking
• Resourceful and independent in coming up with content ideas
• You’ve got 2 yrs of relevant experience and well versed in Canva, Capcut or Adobe Suite (After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

Ready to bring your skills and creativity to a thriving media platform? Apply now and become a part of our growing team!

[Candidates without experience can apply via our Internship Conversion Program]


Wanna be the Face of Confirm Good? Check us out:

postedCompany.description:
Confirm Good is a Singapore-based media publishing platform that brings the latest deals, news and happenings to locals in our little red dot.


We offer first-hand information on deals and promotions on a daily basis and we curate and pick out the best deals for our subscribers. We are the first Telegram channel in Singapore to have exclusive partnerships with well-loved brands such as Krispy Kreme, Llao Llao, LiHO, and Tiger Sugar to offer our subscribers giveaways, one-for-one deals, and many other promotions and discounts!


We are expanding to bring our tight-knit community even closer by adding a more personal touch to our offerings through Confirm Good with not only a wider variety of partnerships, but also with articles covering various topics to appeal to a wider demographic.


With well-researched insights and advice spanning a wide range of topics, we seek to deliver simple to understand and beneficial contents for our readers.


We are always on a lookout for talents and we can offer you a broad range of exciting careers of your choice.


To qualify for a full-time position with us, we would prefer it if you have at least 2 years of working experience in a relevant field or if you can impress us with your work. 


If you are really keen to try your hand at something new and don’t have the experience, you can apply for our 6-month Internship Program.


We look forward to hearing from you :)


Don’t worry, Confirm Good Lah!
postedCompany.name: CONFIRM GOOD PTE. LTD.
